daily.today_energy: Your inner fire is burning bright today, Leo. This is your moment to let your authentic self shine without apology. The universe is basically cheering you on—trust that magnetism you're radiating.
daily.love: Whether you're coupled or solo, vulnerability is your superpower right now. Someone notices when you drop the performance and just *be*. Real connection happens in those unguarded moments.
daily.career: Your ideas have serious potential energy today. Don't just think it—speak it into existence. Collaboration over competition will unlock doors you didn't even know existed.
daily.health: Your body's asking for movement that feels good, not punishing. Dance, stretch, walk—whatever makes you feel alive. Rest isn't laziness; it's how you recharge that legendary Leo glow.

weekly.overview: This week's energy wants you to embrace your authentic self, Leo. Mercury's moving through your sector of expression, so your words hit different rn. Trust the vibe shifts and lean into conversations you've been avoiding.
weekly.love: If you're coupled up, your person's picking up on your magnetic energy—use it to reconnect over something new. Single? Someone's been noticing you from the sidelines. Either way, vulnerability is your superpower this week.
weekly.career: You're in your creative era. Whether it's pitching ideas or tackling projects differently, the universe is backing your bold moves. Don't downplay your contributions—people are listening and impressed by what you're building.
weekly.health: Your body's asking for intentional rest, not lazy avoidance. Move in ways that feel good, nourish yourself with intention, and notice how you feel when you honor those signals. Energy follows attention.
